title: PWK's Winterprojekt 2025
description: The "PWK Winterprojekt" is an annual Minecraft project that has its own modpack this year!
body:
![PWK Winterprojekt Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c6b0113406944a013ba6dfb8f8dd632c28d311a.png)



The "PWK Winterprojekt" is a series of minecraft projects, around winter, which features different maps, plugins and sometimes, as in these year, even complete modpacks!

Even tho the project itself is private, the modpack is free for everyone to use and have fun with it!

## Learn more
Check out the [wiki](https://www.playwithk.de/en/projekte/minecraft/winterprojekt/wp2025/wiki) (WIP) for detailed guides, mod interactions, and tips to get started.

Try the Enhanced Edition of the pack for additional clientside content and tweaks [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pkws-enhanced-winterprojekt2025)!

## Features
### Better World Generation:
Discover breathtaking landscapes, bigger biomes and new vanilla+ biomes.
Explore reimagined structures, villages and more!

### Start your farming empire:
Make big farms with more then 13 new crops, new soil and more!
Craft food items out of your hard earned goods and show them by placing them down.

### New storage systems:
Build stunning storage systems with Storage Drawers and ME-Systems, that allow even autocrafting and more! 
Use upgradable backpacks to store your items even on the go!

### Cozy winter vibes:
Get new decorations, light garlands and presents! Discover new winter-themed blocks, tweaks and even sleds!

### Quality of Life:
Use Waystones for fast travel, enjoy a lot of vanilla tweaks like horizontal banners, Elevator and new  fishing loot!

### Voice Chat:
Use the ingame voice chat and enjoy the new sound ambience that comes with it.
